nasb.text: But the testimony which I receive is not from man, but I say these things so that you may be saved.

esv.text: Not that the testimony that I receive is from man, but I say these things so that you may be saved.

cnv.text: 我不接受從人而來的見證，但我說這些事，是要你們得救。

ccb.text: 其实我并不需要人的见证，我之所以提起这些事是为了使你们得救。

csbs.text: 其实我所接受的见证不是从人来的。不过我说这些话，是为了要你们得救。
